prompt: A depth map of a six-lane freeway, with a red sports car in the center lane foreground (bright), a white truck in the left lane midground (mid-gray), overhead road signs in the top center (darker gray), and distant vehicles and sky in the background (black).
prompt_refined: Generate a grayscale depth map of a six-lane freeway. A red sports car in the center lane of the foreground is represented as bright (closest). A white truck in the left lane of the midground is depicted as mid-gray. Overhead road signs in the top-center are rendered as darker gray. Distant vehicles and sky in the background are shown as black (farthest).
objects: red sports car in the center lane of the foreground
white truck in the left lane of the midground
overhead road signs in the top-center
